productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Shirt
description: Composition Black shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a spread collar, a patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding, a buttoned placket and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring, dry clean or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Top notch style and comfort, this shirt from united colors of benetton is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. The design and attention to detail is sure to earn you fashion accolades, while the fabric will keep you fresh all day. Team this with slim jeans and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
